github.description: Git operations, PRs, issues, branch management

playwright.description: Browser automation, E2E testing, screenshots, DOM inspection. No API key needed.

firecrawl.description: Web scraping and docs extraction. Used to verify API signatures before use. Get free key at firecrawl.dev

sequential-thinking.description: Multi-step reasoning chains. No API key needed.

filesystem.description: Explicit file operations with audit trail. Scoped to current project directory.

supabase.description: Database schema management, RLS policies, migrations. Get token from Supabase dashboard.
